request_payload.exposure_text: Retired General Mark Reynolds: 'The 2024 security reforms worked exactly as intended. My team saw firsthand how these measures stopped multiple threats before they could escalate. The critics who claim these powers infringe on liberties don't understand the real-world tradeoffs we face. As someone who's served 30 years protecting this country, I can tell you: these measures are necessary, effective, and strike the right balance. Don't let fearmongering distract from what's actually keeping us safe.' #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
